data.body: Fix pushed as Gerrit change 460 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/460). All 3 stale external tests updated (sys.path for ref-lock; single_turn for text_mode; enable gate for review_code). Verified live: text_mode + review_code GREEN against the real model; ref-lock import resolves. Awaiting votes.
